shared_properties: Core canvas stays 1920x1080 at 16:9 with the project palette copied in every file.
Foreground floor graphics align to the fixed camera and the lower 320 px of the duel scene.
differences: This asset isolates the floor strip, projectile travel lane, and reflection line markers used for timing read clarity.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Timing line placement, projectile approach space, and 600 px judgement lane grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Floor material, duel rail spacing, and lane contrast grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Spawn as a foreground SpriteBundle layer with integer-position snapping and no atlas animation.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/duel_floor_cast_lane.png through AssetServer and attach it to the floor lane entity during battle scene setup.
runtime_notes: Place the strip center at x=960 px and y=920 px.
Keep the reflection line marker 20 px in front of the player lane anchor for rules parity with the GDD.
Reserve transparent margins around the outer floor edges so damage popup sprites do not clip.

context.role: Foreground battle stage strip that shows the projectile path and reflection threshold.
context.usage: Visible whenever the duel scene is active and used as the baseline for actor and projectile placement.

deliverables.notes: Foreground floor strip with one 600 px judgement lane marker and card stand trim.

acceptance_criteria: The judgement lane spans exactly 600x30 px and is centered at x=960 px with a cyan #00FFFF Perfect bar nested inside a lime #ADFF2F Good zone.
Bottom floor baseline is fully opaque from x=0 px to x=1920 px with no subpixel blur.
